---
title: "Simple Dashboard"
author: "`r params$scenarioname`"
output: 
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    vertical_layout: fill

params:
  scenarioname: NULL
  magpie_data: NULL
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(flexdashboard)
library(ggplot2)
library(plotly)
library(magclass)
library(mip)
library(quitte)

configFile <- system.file(package = "postprom", file.path("extdata", "validationConfig_OPEN-PROM.csv"))
piam <- read.csv(configFile, sep = ";", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
regionspiam <- unique(piam$region)

data <- params$magpie_data
names(dimnames(data))[3] <- "variable.unit"
#keep only regions in PIAM config
data <- data[intersect(getRegions(data), strsplit(regionspiam[2], ",")[[1]]),,]
facet_order <- intersect(getRegions(data), strsplit(regionspiam[2], ",")[[1]])
ncol <- ceiling(length(facet_order) / 3)

```

# Emissions CO2 {data-icon="glyphicon glyphicon-stats"}

```{r Emissions CO2 plot}
vars <- c(
  "Emissions|CO2|Energy|Demand.Mt CO2/yr",
  "Emissions|CO2|Energy|Supply.Mt CO2/yr",
  "Emissions|CO2|Industrial Processes.Mt CO2/yr",
  "Emissions|CO2|AFOLU.Mt CO2/yr",
  "Emissions|CO2|Energy|Demand|Enhanced Weathering.Mt CO2/yr",
  "Emissions|CO2|Energy|Demand|Direct Air Capture.Mt CO2/yr"
)

unit <- sub(".*\\.", "", vars[1])
totalvar <- "Emissions|CO2"

elMix <- as.quitte(data[, , vars]) %>%
  select(-c(unit, model, scenario))

elMix$region <- factor(elMix$region, levels = facet_order)

total <- as.quitte(data[, , totalvar]) %>%
  select(-c(unit, model, scenario))

total$region <- factor(total$region, levels = facet_order)

vars_unique <- unique(elMix$variable)

# consistent colors
cols <- colorRampPalette(
  RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(12, "Set3")
)(length(vars_unique))

names(cols) <- vars_unique

plist <- list()

for(i in seq_along(facet_order)) {

  r <- facet_order[i]

  df <- elMix %>%
    filter(region == r)

  df_total <- total %>%
    filter(region == r)

  p <- plot_ly()

  for(v in vars_unique) {

    df_v <- df %>%
      filter(variable == v)

    # positive values only
    df_pos <- df_v %>%
      mutate(value = ifelse(value > 0, value, NA))

    # negative values only
    df_neg <- df_v %>%
      mutate(value = ifelse(value < 0, value, NA))

    hover_txt <- paste0(
      "<b>", v, "</b><br>",
      "Year: ", df_v$period, "<br>",
      "Value: ", round(df_v$value, 2)
    )

    # positive stack
    p <- p %>%
      add_trace(
        data = df_pos,
        x = ~period,
        y = ~value,

        type = "scatter",
        mode = "none",

        stackgroup = "positive",

        fillcolor = cols[v],
        line = list(color = cols[v]),

        name = v,
        legendgroup = v,

        text = hover_txt,
        hoverinfo = "text",

        showlegend = (i == 1)
      )

    # negative stack
    p <- p %>%
      add_trace(
        data = df_neg,
        x = ~period,
        y = ~value,

        type = "scatter",
        mode = "none",

        stackgroup = "negative",

        fillcolor = cols[v],
        line = list(color = cols[v]),

        name = v,
        legendgroup = v,

        text = hover_txt,
        hoverinfo = "text",

        showlegend = FALSE
      )
  }

  # total emissions line
  p <- p %>%
    add_trace(
      data = df_total,
      x = ~period,
      y = ~value,

      type = "scatter",
      mode = "lines",

      line = list(
        color = "black",
        width = 3
      ),

      name = "Total",
      legendgroup = "Total",

      showlegend = (i == 1),

      text = ~paste0(
        "<b>Total</b><br>",
        "Year: ", period, "<br>",
        "Value: ", round(value, 2)
      ),

      hoverinfo = "text"
    )

  p <- p %>%
    layout(
      hovermode = "x unified",

      annotations = list(
        list(
          text = paste0("<b>", r, "</b>"),
          x = 0.5,
          y = 1.05,
          xref = "paper",
          yref = "paper",
          showarrow = FALSE,
          font = list(size = 14)
        ),
          # unit label (top-left)
        list(
          text = unit,
          x = 0,
          y = 1.05,
          xref = "paper",
          yref = "paper",
          xanchor = "left",
          showarrow = FALSE,
          font = list(size = 10)
        )
      ),

      xaxis = list(
        title = ""
      ),

      yaxis = list(
        title = "",
        autorange = TRUE,
        zeroline = TRUE,
        zerolinewidth = 2,
        zerolinecolor = "black"
      ),

      margin = list(
        l = 35,
        r = 10,
        b = 25,
        t = 40
      )
    )

  plist[[r]] <- p
}

# combine panels
g <- subplot(
  plist,
  nrows = ceiling(length(plist) / ncol),
  shareX = TRUE,
  shareY = FALSE,
  titleX = FALSE,
  margin = 0.02
)

# force x tick labels on all subplots
for(i in seq_along(plist)) {

  axis_name <- if(i == 1) "xaxis" else paste0("xaxis", i)

  g <- g %>%
    layout(
      setNames(
        list(
          list(
            showticklabels = TRUE,
            matches = NULL
          )
        ),
        axis_name
      )
    )
}

# final layout
g <- g %>%
  layout(
    showlegend = TRUE,

    hovermode = "x unified",

    legend = list(
      orientation = "h",
      x = 0.5,
      xanchor = "center",
      y = -0.1,
      yanchor = "top",
      font = list(size = 10)
    ),

    height = 800
  )

g
```

---

# Carbon Prices {data-icon="glyphicon glyphicon-eur"}

```{r Carbon Prices plot}
# -----------------------------
# DATA
# -----------------------------
vars <- c(
  "Price|Carbon.US$2015/tn CO2"
)

unit <- sub(".*\\.", "", vars[1])
totalvar <- "Price|Carbon"

elMix <- as.quitte(data[, , vars]) %>%
  select(-c(unit, model, scenario))

elMix$region <- factor(elMix$region, levels = facet_order)

total <- as.quitte(data[, , totalvar]) %>%
  select(-c(unit, model, scenario))

total$region <- factor(total$region, levels = facet_order)

vars_unique <- unique(elMix$variable)

# consistent colors
cols <- colorRampPalette(
  RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(12, "Set3")
)(length(vars_unique))

names(cols) <- vars_unique

plist <- list()

for(i in seq_along(facet_order)) {

  r <- facet_order[i]

  df <- elMix %>%
    filter(region == r)

  df_total <- total %>%
    filter(region == r)

  p <- plot_ly()

  for(v in vars_unique) {

    df_v <- df %>%
      filter(variable == v)

    # positive values only
    df_pos <- df_v %>%
      mutate(value = ifelse(value > 0, value, NA))

    # negative values only
    df_neg <- df_v %>%
      mutate(value = ifelse(value < 0, value, NA))

    hover_txt <- paste0(
      "<b>", v, "</b><br>",
      "Year: ", df_v$period, "<br>",
      "Value: ", round(df_v$value, 2)
    )

    # positive stack
    p <- p %>%
      add_trace(
        data = df_pos,
        x = ~period,
        y = ~value,

        type = "scatter",
        mode = "none",

        stackgroup = "positive",

        fillcolor = cols[v],
        line = list(color = cols[v]),

        name = v,
        legendgroup = v,

        text = hover_txt,
        hoverinfo = "text",

        showlegend = (i == 1)
      )

    # negative stack
    p <- p %>%
      add_trace(
        data = df_neg,
        x = ~period,
        y = ~value,

        type = "scatter",
        mode = "none",

        stackgroup = "negative",

        fillcolor = cols[v],
        line = list(color = cols[v]),

        name = v,
        legendgroup = v,

        text = hover_txt,
        hoverinfo = "text",

        showlegend = FALSE
      )
  }

  # total emissions line
  p <- p %>%
    add_trace(
      data = df_total,
      x = ~period,
      y = ~value,

      type = "scatter",
      mode = "lines",

      line = list(
        color = "black",
        width = 3
      ),

      name = "Total",
      legendgroup = "Total",

      showlegend = (i == 1),

      text = ~paste0(
        "<b>Total</b><br>",
        "Year: ", period, "<br>",
        "Value: ", round(value, 2)
      ),

      hoverinfo = "text"
    )

  p <- p %>%
    layout(
      hovermode = "x unified",

      annotations = list(
        list(
          text = paste0("<b>", r, "</b>"),
          x = 0.5,
          y = 1.05,
          xref = "paper",
          yref = "paper",
          showarrow = FALSE,
          font = list(size = 14)
        ),
          # unit label (top-left)
        list(
          text = unit,
          x = 0,
          y = 1.05,
          xref = "paper",
          yref = "paper",
          xanchor = "left",
          showarrow = FALSE,
          font = list(size = 10)
        )
      ),

      xaxis = list(
        title = ""
      ),

      yaxis = list(
        title = "",
        autorange = TRUE,
        zeroline = TRUE,
        zerolinewidth = 2,
        zerolinecolor = "black"
      ),

      margin = list(
        l = 35,
        r = 10,
        b = 25,
        t = 40
      )
    )

  plist[[r]] <- p
}

# combine panels
g <- subplot(
  plist,
  nrows = ceiling(length(plist) / ncol),
  shareX = TRUE,
  shareY = FALSE,
  titleX = FALSE,
  margin = 0.02
)

# force x tick labels on all subplots
for(i in seq_along(plist)) {

  axis_name <- if(i == 1) "xaxis" else paste0("xaxis", i)

  g <- g %>%
    layout(
      setNames(
        list(
          list(
            showticklabels = TRUE,
            matches = NULL
          )
        ),
        axis_name
      )
    )
}

# final layout
g <- g %>%
  layout(
    showlegend = TRUE,

    hovermode = "x unified",

    legend = list(
      orientation = "h",
      x = 0.5,
      xanchor = "center",
      y = -0.1,
      yanchor = "top",
      font = list(size = 10)
    ),

    height = 800
  )

g
```

---

# Secondary Energy Electricity {data-icon="glyphicon glyphicon-scale"}

```{r Secondary Energy Electricity plot}
vars <- c(
  "Secondary Energy|Electricity|Biofuels|w/ CCS.TWh",
  "Secondary Energy|Electricity|Biofuels|w/o CCS.TWh",
  "Secondary Energy|Electricity|Coal|w/ CCS.TWh",
  "Secondary Energy|Electricity|Coal|w/o CCS.TWh",
  "Secondary Energy|Electricity|Gas|w/ CCS.TWh",
  "Secondary Energy|Electricity|Gas|w/o CCS.TWh",
  "Secondary Energy|Electricity|Geothermal and other renewable sources.TWh",
  "Secondary Energy|Electricity|Heat.TWh",
  "Secondary Energy|Electricity|Hydrogen.TWh",
  "Secondary Energy|Electricity|Oil.TWh",
  "Secondary Energy|Electricity|Hydro.TWh",
  "Secondary Energy|Electricity|Wind.TWh",
  "Secondary Energy|Electricity|Solar.TWh",
  "Secondary Energy|Electricity|Nuclear.TWh"
)

unit <- sub(".*\\.", "", vars[1])
totalvar <- "Secondary Energy|Electricity"

elMix <- as.quitte(data[, , vars]) %>%
  select(-c(unit, model, scenario))

elMix$region <- factor(elMix$region, levels = facet_order)

total <- as.quitte(data[, , totalvar]) %>%
  select(-c(unit, model, scenario))

total$region <- factor(total$region, levels = facet_order)

vars_unique <- unique(elMix$variable)

# consistent colors
cols <- colorRampPalette(
  RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(12, "Set3")
)(length(vars_unique))

names(cols) <- vars_unique

plist <- list()

for(i in seq_along(facet_order)) {

  r <- facet_order[i]

  df <- elMix %>%
    filter(region == r)

  df_total <- total %>%
    filter(region == r)

  p <- plot_ly()

  for(v in vars_unique) {

    df_v <- df %>%
      filter(variable == v)

    # positive values only
    df_pos <- df_v %>%
      mutate(value = ifelse(value > 0, value, NA))

    # negative values only
    df_neg <- df_v %>%
      mutate(value = ifelse(value < 0, value, NA))

    hover_txt <- paste0(
      "<b>", v, "</b><br>",
      "Year: ", df_v$period, "<br>",
      "Value: ", round(df_v$value, 2)
    )

    # positive stack
    p <- p %>%
      add_trace(
        data = df_pos,
        x = ~period,
        y = ~value,

        type = "scatter",
        mode = "none",

        stackgroup = "positive",

        fillcolor = cols[v],
        line = list(color = cols[v]),

        name = v,
        legendgroup = v,

        text = hover_txt,
        hoverinfo = "text",

        showlegend = (i == 1)
      )

    # negative stack
    p <- p %>%
      add_trace(
        data = df_neg,
        x = ~period,
        y = ~value,

        type = "scatter",
        mode = "none",

        stackgroup = "negative",

        fillcolor = cols[v],
        line = list(color = cols[v]),

        name = v,
        legendgroup = v,

        text = hover_txt,
        hoverinfo = "text",

        showlegend = FALSE
      )
  }

  # total emissions line
  p <- p %>%
    add_trace(
      data = df_total,
      x = ~period,
      y = ~value,

      type = "scatter",
      mode = "lines",

      line = list(
        color = "black",
        width = 3
      ),

      name = "Total",
      legendgroup = "Total",

      showlegend = (i == 1),

      text = ~paste0(
        "<b>Total</b><br>",
        "Year: ", period, "<br>",
        "Value: ", round(value, 2)
      ),

      hoverinfo = "text"
    )

  p <- p %>%
    layout(
      hovermode = "x unified",

      annotations = list(
        list(
          text = paste0("<b>", r, "</b>"),
          x = 0.5,
          y = 1.05,
          xref = "paper",
          yref = "paper",
          showarrow = FALSE,
          font = list(size = 14)
        ),
          # unit label (top-left)
        list(
          text = unit,
          x = 0,
          y = 1.05,
          xref = "paper",
          yref = "paper",
          xanchor = "left",
          showarrow = FALSE,
          font = list(size = 10)
        )
      ),

      xaxis = list(
        title = ""
      ),

      yaxis = list(
        title = "",
        autorange = TRUE,
        zeroline = TRUE,
        zerolinewidth = 2,
        zerolinecolor = "black"
      ),

      margin = list(
        l = 35,
        r = 10,
        b = 25,
        t = 40
      )
    )

  plist[[r]] <- p
}

# combine panels
g <- subplot(
  plist,
  nrows = ceiling(length(plist) / ncol),
  shareX = TRUE,
  shareY = FALSE,
  titleX = FALSE,
  margin = 0.02
)

# force x tick labels on all subplots
for(i in seq_along(plist)) {

  axis_name <- if(i == 1) "xaxis" else paste0("xaxis", i)

  g <- g %>%
    layout(
      setNames(
        list(
          list(
            showticklabels = TRUE,
            matches = NULL
          )
        ),
        axis_name
      )
    )
}

# final layout
g <- g %>%
  layout(
    showlegend = TRUE,

    hovermode = "x unified",

    legend = list(
      orientation = "h",
      x = 0.5,
      xanchor = "center",
      y = -0.1,
      yanchor = "top",
      font = list(size = 10)
    ),

    height = 800
  )

g
```
---

# Capacity|Electricity {data-icon="glyphicon glyphicon-scale"}

```{r Capacity Electricity plot}
vars <- c(
  "Capacity|Electricity|Biofuels|w/ CCS.GW",
  "Capacity|Electricity|Biofuels|w/o CCS.GW",
  "Capacity|Electricity|Coal|w/ CCS.GW",
  "Capacity|Electricity|Coal|w/o CCS.GW",
  "Capacity|Electricity|Gas|w/ CCS.GW",
  "Capacity|Electricity|Gas|w/o CCS.GW",
  "Capacity|Electricity|Geothermal and other renewable sources.GW",
  "Capacity|Electricity|Hydrogen.GW",
  "Capacity|Electricity|Oil.GW",
  "Capacity|Electricity|Hydro.GW",
  "Capacity|Electricity|Wind.GW",
  "Capacity|Electricity|Solar.GW",
  "Capacity|Electricity|Nuclear.GW"
)

unit <- sub(".*\\.", "", vars[1])
totalvar <- "Capacity|Electricity"

elMix <- as.quitte(data[, , vars]) %>%
  select(-c(unit, model, scenario))

elMix$region <- factor(elMix$region, levels = facet_order)

total <- as.quitte(data[, , totalvar]) %>%
  select(-c(unit, model, scenario))

total$region <- factor(total$region, levels = facet_order)

vars_unique <- unique(elMix$variable)

# consistent colors
cols <- colorRampPalette(
  RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(12, "Set3")
)(length(vars_unique))

names(cols) <- vars_unique

plist <- list()

for(i in seq_along(facet_order)) {

  r <- facet_order[i]

  df <- elMix %>%
    filter(region == r)

  df_total <- total %>%
    filter(region == r)

  p <- plot_ly()

  for(v in vars_unique) {

    df_v <- df %>%
      filter(variable == v)

    # positive values only
    df_pos <- df_v %>%
      mutate(value = ifelse(value > 0, value, NA))

    # negative values only
    df_neg <- df_v %>%
      mutate(value = ifelse(value < 0, value, NA))

    hover_txt <- paste0(
      "<b>", v, "</b><br>",
      "Year: ", df_v$period, "<br>",
      "Value: ", round(df_v$value, 2)
    )

    # positive stack
    p <- p %>%
      add_trace(
        data = df_pos,
        x = ~period,
        y = ~value,

        type = "scatter",
        mode = "none",

        stackgroup = "positive",

        fillcolor = cols[v],
        line = list(color = cols[v]),

        name = v,
        legendgroup = v,

        text = hover_txt,
        hoverinfo = "text",

        showlegend = (i == 1)
      )

    # negative stack
    p <- p %>%
      add_trace(
        data = df_neg,
        x = ~period,
        y = ~value,

        type = "scatter",
        mode = "none",

        stackgroup = "negative",

        fillcolor = cols[v],
        line = list(color = cols[v]),

        name = v,
        legendgroup = v,

        text = hover_txt,
        hoverinfo = "text",

        showlegend = FALSE
      )
  }

  # total emissions line
  p <- p %>%
    add_trace(
      data = df_total,
      x = ~period,
      y = ~value,

      type = "scatter",
      mode = "lines",

      line = list(
        color = "black",
        width = 3
      ),

      name = "Total",
      legendgroup = "Total",

      showlegend = (i == 1),

      text = ~paste0(
        "<b>Total</b><br>",
        "Year: ", period, "<br>",
        "Value: ", round(value, 2)
      ),

      hoverinfo = "text"
    )

  p <- p %>%
    layout(
      hovermode = "x unified",

      annotations = list(
        list(
          text = paste0("<b>", r, "</b>"),
          x = 0.5,
          y = 1.05,
          xref = "paper",
          yref = "paper",
          showarrow = FALSE,
          font = list(size = 14)
        ),
          # unit label (top-left)
        list(
          text = unit,
          x = 0,
          y = 1.05,
          xref = "paper",
          yref = "paper",
          xanchor = "left",
          showarrow = FALSE,
          font = list(size = 10)
        )
      ),

      xaxis = list(
        title = ""
      ),

      yaxis = list(
        title = "",
        autorange = TRUE,
        zeroline = TRUE,
        zerolinewidth = 2,
        zerolinecolor = "black"
      ),

      margin = list(
        l = 35,
        r = 10,
        b = 25,
        t = 40
      )
    )

  plist[[r]] <- p
}

# combine panels
g <- subplot(
  plist,
  nrows = ceiling(length(plist) / ncol),
  shareX = TRUE,
  shareY = FALSE,
  titleX = FALSE,
  margin = 0.02
)

# force x tick labels on all subplots
for(i in seq_along(plist)) {

  axis_name <- if(i == 1) "xaxis" else paste0("xaxis", i)

  g <- g %>%
    layout(
      setNames(
        list(
          list(
            showticklabels = TRUE,
            matches = NULL
          )
        ),
        axis_name
      )
    )
}

# final layout
g <- g %>%
  layout(
    showlegend = TRUE,

    hovermode = "x unified",

    legend = list(
      orientation = "h",
      x = 0.5,
      xanchor = "center",
      y = -0.1,
      yanchor = "top",
      font = list(size = 10)
    ),

    height = 800
  )

g
```
---

# Final Energy {data-icon="glyphicon glyphicon-scale"}

```{r Final Energy plot}
vars <- c(
  "Final Energy|Industry.Mtoe",
  "Final Energy|Transportation.Mtoe",
  "Final Energy|Non-Energy Use.Mtoe",
  "Final Energy|Residential and Commercial.Mtoe",
  "Final Energy|Bunkers.Mtoe",
  "Final Energy|Carbon Management.Mtoe"
)

unit <- sub(".*\\.", "", vars[1])
totalvar <- "Final Energy"

elMix <- as.quitte(data[, , vars]) %>%
  select(-c(unit, model, scenario))

elMix$region <- factor(elMix$region, levels = facet_order)

total <- as.quitte(data[, , totalvar]) %>%
  select(-c(unit, model, scenario))

total$region <- factor(total$region, levels = facet_order)

vars_unique <- unique(elMix$variable)

# consistent colors
cols <- colorRampPalette(
  RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(12, "Set3")
)(length(vars_unique))

names(cols) <- vars_unique

plist <- list()

for(i in seq_along(facet_order)) {

  r <- facet_order[i]

  df <- elMix %>%
    filter(region == r)

  df_total <- total %>%
    filter(region == r)

  p <- plot_ly()

  for(v in vars_unique) {

    df_v <- df %>%
      filter(variable == v)

    # positive values only
    df_pos <- df_v %>%
      mutate(value = ifelse(value > 0, value, NA))

    # negative values only
    df_neg <- df_v %>%
      mutate(value = ifelse(value < 0, value, NA))

    hover_txt <- paste0(
      "<b>", v, "</b><br>",
      "Year: ", df_v$period, "<br>",
      "Value: ", round(df_v$value, 2)
    )

    # positive stack
    p <- p %>%
      add_trace(
        data = df_pos,
        x = ~period,
        y = ~value,

        type = "scatter",
        mode = "none",

        stackgroup = "positive",

        fillcolor = cols[v],
        line = list(color = cols[v]),

        name = v,
        legendgroup = v,

        text = hover_txt,
        hoverinfo = "text",

        showlegend = (i == 1)
      )

    # negative stack
    p <- p %>%
      add_trace(
        data = df_neg,
        x = ~period,
        y = ~value,

        type = "scatter",
        mode = "none",

        stackgroup = "negative",

        fillcolor = cols[v],
        line = list(color = cols[v]),

        name = v,
        legendgroup = v,

        text = hover_txt,
        hoverinfo = "text",

        showlegend = FALSE
      )
  }

  # total emissions line
  p <- p %>%
    add_trace(
      data = df_total,
      x = ~period,
      y = ~value,

      type = "scatter",
      mode = "lines",

      line = list(
        color = "black",
        width = 3
      ),

      name = "Total",
      legendgroup = "Total",

      showlegend = (i == 1),

      text = ~paste0(
        "<b>Total</b><br>",
        "Year: ", period, "<br>",
        "Value: ", round(value, 2)
      ),

      hoverinfo = "text"
    )

  p <- p %>%
    layout(
      hovermode = "x unified",

      annotations = list(
        list(
          text = paste0("<b>", r, "</b>"),
          x = 0.5,
          y = 1.05,
          xref = "paper",
          yref = "paper",
          showarrow = FALSE,
          font = list(size = 14)
        ),
          # unit label (top-left)
        list(
          text = unit,
          x = 0,
          y = 1.05,
          xref = "paper",
          yref = "paper",
          xanchor = "left",
          showarrow = FALSE,
          font = list(size = 10)
        )
      ),

      xaxis = list(
        title = ""
      ),

      yaxis = list(
        title = "",
        autorange = TRUE,
        zeroline = TRUE,
        zerolinewidth = 2,
        zerolinecolor = "black"
      ),

      margin = list(
        l = 35,
        r = 10,
        b = 25,
        t = 40
      )
    )

  plist[[r]] <- p
}

# combine panels
g <- subplot(
  plist,
  nrows = ceiling(length(plist) / ncol),
  shareX = TRUE,
  shareY = FALSE,
  titleX = FALSE,
  margin = 0.02
)

# force x tick labels on all subplots
for(i in seq_along(plist)) {

  axis_name <- if(i == 1) "xaxis" else paste0("xaxis", i)

  g <- g %>%
    layout(
      setNames(
        list(
          list(
            showticklabels = TRUE,
            matches = NULL
          )
        ),
        axis_name
      )
    )
}

# final layout
g <- g %>%
  layout(
    showlegend = TRUE,

    hovermode = "x unified",

    legend = list(
      orientation = "h",
      x = 0.5,
      xanchor = "center",
      y = -0.1,
      yanchor = "top",
      font = list(size = 10)
    ),

    height = 800
  )

g
```
---

# Final Energy Fuel {data-icon="glyphicon glyphicon-scale"}

```{r Final Energy Fuel plot}
vars <- c(
  "Final Energy|Solids.Mtoe",
  "Final Energy|Fossil Liquids.Mtoe",
  "Final Energy|Gas.Mtoe",
  "Final Energy|Heat.Mtoe",
  "Final Energy|Renewables.Mtoe",
  "Final Energy|Electricity.Mtoe",
  "Final Energy|Hydrogen.Mtoe",
  "Final Energy|Other fuels.Mtoe",
  "Final Energy|Biofuels.Mtoe",
  "Final Energy|Nuclear.Mtoe"
)

unit <- sub(".*\\.", "", vars[1])
totalvar <- "Final Energy"

elMix <- as.quitte(data[, , vars]) %>%
  select(-c(unit, model, scenario))

elMix$region <- factor(elMix$region, levels = facet_order)

total <- as.quitte(data[, , totalvar]) %>%
  select(-c(unit, model, scenario))

total$region <- factor(total$region, levels = facet_order)

vars_unique <- unique(elMix$variable)

# consistent colors
cols <- colorRampPalette(
  RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(12, "Set3")
)(length(vars_unique))

names(cols) <- vars_unique

plist <- list()

for(i in seq_along(facet_order)) {

  r <- facet_order[i]

  df <- elMix %>%
    filter(region == r)

  df_total <- total %>%
    filter(region == r)

  p <- plot_ly()

  for(v in vars_unique) {

    df_v <- df %>%
      filter(variable == v)

    # positive values only
    df_pos <- df_v %>%
      mutate(value = ifelse(value > 0, value, NA))

    # negative values only
    df_neg <- df_v %>%
      mutate(value = ifelse(value < 0, value, NA))

    hover_txt <- paste0(
      "<b>", v, "</b><br>",
      "Year: ", df_v$period, "<br>",
      "Value: ", round(df_v$value, 2)
    )

    # positive stack
    p <- p %>%
      add_trace(
        data = df_pos,
        x = ~period,
        y = ~value,

        type = "scatter",
        mode = "none",

        stackgroup = "positive",

        fillcolor = cols[v],
        line = list(color = cols[v]),

        name = v,
        legendgroup = v,

        text = hover_txt,
        hoverinfo = "text",

        showlegend = (i == 1)
      )

    # negative stack
    p <- p %>%
      add_trace(
        data = df_neg,
        x = ~period,
        y = ~value,

        type = "scatter",
        mode = "none",

        stackgroup = "negative",

        fillcolor = cols[v],
        line = list(color = cols[v]),

        name = v,
        legendgroup = v,

        text = hover_txt,
        hoverinfo = "text",

        showlegend = FALSE
      )
  }

  # total emissions line
  p <- p %>%
    add_trace(
      data = df_total,
      x = ~period,
      y = ~value,

      type = "scatter",
      mode = "lines",

      line = list(
        color = "black",
        width = 3
      ),

      name = "Total",
      legendgroup = "Total",

      showlegend = (i == 1),

      text = ~paste0(
        "<b>Total</b><br>",
        "Year: ", period, "<br>",
        "Value: ", round(value, 2)
      ),

      hoverinfo = "text"
    )

  p <- p %>%
    layout(
      hovermode = "x unified",

      annotations = list(
        list(
          text = paste0("<b>", r, "</b>"),
          x = 0.5,
          y = 1.05,
          xref = "paper",
          yref = "paper",
          showarrow = FALSE,
          font = list(size = 14)
        ),
          # unit label (top-left)
        list(
          text = unit,
          x = 0,
          y = 1.05,
          xref = "paper",
          yref = "paper",
          xanchor = "left",
          showarrow = FALSE,
          font = list(size = 10)
        )
      ),

      xaxis = list(
        title = ""
      ),

      yaxis = list(
        title = "",
        autorange = TRUE,
        zeroline = TRUE,
        zerolinewidth = 2,
        zerolinecolor = "black"
      ),

      margin = list(
        l = 35,
        r = 10,
        b = 25,
        t = 40
      )
    )

  plist[[r]] <- p
}

# combine panels
g <- subplot(
  plist,
  nrows = ceiling(length(plist) / ncol),
  shareX = TRUE,
  shareY = FALSE,
  titleX = FALSE,
  margin = 0.02
)

# force x tick labels on all subplots
for(i in seq_along(plist)) {

  axis_name <- if(i == 1) "xaxis" else paste0("xaxis", i)

  g <- g %>%
    layout(
      setNames(
        list(
          list(
            showticklabels = TRUE,
            matches = NULL
          )
        ),
        axis_name
      )
    )
}

# final layout
g <- g %>%
  layout(
    showlegend = TRUE,

    hovermode = "x unified",

    legend = list(
      orientation = "h",
      x = 0.5,
      xanchor = "center",
      y = -0.1,
      yanchor = "top",
      font = list(size = 10)
    ),

    height = 800
  )

g
```
